prompt: Create the JSONata view mode mapping for node.article.teaser. Provider: my_drupal_theme. Fields from the data model: title (string), field_body (text), field_image (reference to media.image, has .url and .alt), field_category (reference to taxonomy_term.category, has .name). Output the JSONata expression.

assertions.description: The expression returns an array (starts with '[' or wraps in array)
title field is mapped to a heading component
Nested fields use dot notation: field_image.url, field_image.alt
Optional reference fields use conditional: field ? {...} pattern
